---
title: "Projects"
---

# Natural Language Processing

-   KoRank --- Ranking Korean Shows by Linguistic Level

-   KONG Project *(Coming Soon...)*

-   VCA Project *(Coming Soon...)*

# Data Analytics

-   [Unnamed Project \_(Coming soon\...)\_](projects/hi.qmd)

-   [Movies on Netflix, Prime Video, Hulu and Disney+ Cluster Analysis](https://github.com/wjonasreger/STAT430_FinalProject)

-   [Gas Turbine Carbon Monoxide Emissions](https://github.com/wjonasreger/STAT443_FinalProject)

-   [Walmart Sales During Stormy Weather Analysis](assets/docs/publications/walmart_425_outline.pdf)

# Websites

-   [UIUC STAT 100 Course Website](https://stat100website.web.illinois.edu)

-   [Discovering Data Science Course Website](https://wjonasreger.github.io/DigitalScholars_DataScience/)

# Other Projects

-   [Visual Statistics Shiny App](https://h550e6-wjonasreger.shinyapps.io/rrvisapp/)

-   [Using Peptide Surfaces to Study the Reprogramming of Malignant Melanoma Cells Towards Identification of a Cancer Stem Cell State](assets/docs/publications/ACS%20Internship%20Article%20(2020%20reformat).pdf)
